cards.title: Deltarune trended so hard it #deltaruined
cards.caption: Fandom joy and fandom despair are the same emotion. Deltarune trends, the timeline melts. Threadverse caught this one mid-meltdown. What game does this to you?
cards.povText: POV: your favorite game updates and the whole timeline loses it

cards.title: Every trending celebrity, two possible reasons
cards.caption: The two-question flowchart everyone secretly runs when a celebrity trends. 888 people felt this in their bones. Threadverse surfaced it from the noise. Which one do YOU brace for first?
cards.quote: wait are they dead or are they nazis
cards.povText: POV: a celebrity is trending and you already know it's one of two things

cards.title: My reaction to the top trending topic: There wolf.
cards.caption: Young Frankenstein energy for whatever is trending today. 'There wolf.' says everything and nothing. Threadverse pulled this gem from the pile. What's your go-to reaction gif?
cards.povText: POV: you open the trending tab and this is the only correct response

cards.title: Today's fastest-climbing users, ranked
cards.caption: A leaderboard of who's trending up right now. Fun idea, but the names mean nothing without context. Threadverse saw it climb. Would you follow a 'who's rising' feed?

cards.title: Hip dips were never a thing
cards.caption: Nobody had a name for it until it started trending. The internet invents insecurities for fun now. What's yours? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: nobody i know has ever so much as brought up the concept of hipdips
cards.povText: POV: you were fine until the algorithm told you weren't

cards.title: We Want Valko Back
cards.caption: Day 3 of a fandom trending campaign. Zero context for anyone outside it. Noise, not signal.

cards.title: Me, Looking At Trending Topics
cards.caption: That old-film man staring into the sea IS the mood every time you open trending. We feel this in our algorithm. Reply with your trending-tab face.
cards.povText: POV: you open the trending tab and immediately regret it

cards.title: Clicked Stephen Miller, Got Louisiana
cards.caption: The #1 trending topic linked to a timeline about the wrong Miller and the wrong LA entirely. Trending is broken and this is the funniest proof. One feed, zero noise beats this.
cards.quote: Both L.A. and LA as in Louisiana, no Miller at all.

cards.title: Start Trending 9:15
cards.caption: A coordinated fan-account trend schedule. All logistics, no payoff for outsiders.

cards.title: New #1 Trending MV
cards.caption: A K-pop chart-milestone RT. Big for the fandom, flat for everyone else.

cards.title: Krystari Thanks Purina
cards.caption: A brand-tag trending push in another language. Pure campaign noise.

cards.title: Start Trending 9:15
cards.caption: Another fan-account concert trend schedule. Same logistics-only template, no hook.

cards.title: SAMI Is Trending. Do Not Google It.
cards.caption: "Trending, something about grabbing sweaty men? Sounds about right." The exact energy of every mystery trend nobody can explain. What trend has YOU this confused?
cards.quote: Apparently SAMI is trending, something to do with grabbing sweaty men? Sounds about right :3
cards.povText: POV: something is trending and you're terrified to find out why

cards.title: Day 3: We Want Valko Back
cards.caption: A fandom on day 3 of a coordinated campaign to get a character back in a game. High energy, zero context for anyone outside the stan circle.

cards.title: Me Looking At Trending Topics
cards.caption: That black-and-white gentleman staring into the void = all of us checking what's 'trending' lately. The feed knows what it did. What's the worst trend you saw this week?
cards.povText: POV: you open the trending tab and immediately regret it

cards.title: Clicked 'Stephen Miller.' Got Louisiana.
cards.caption: Trending links so broken that #1 'Stephen Miller' surfaced a timeline about L.A. and Louisiana with zero Miller in sight. This is exactly why we curate instead of trend-chase. Ever clicked a trend and gotten nonsense?
cards.quote: Both L.A. and LA as in Louisiana, no Miller at all.

cards.title: Gawin Caskey: Start Trending 9:15
cards.caption: A fan-org posting exact trend-timing instructions for a GMMTV live house event. Pure coordination logistics, no hook for outsiders.

cards.title: BABYMONSTER Hits #1 Worldwide
cards.caption: 'I LIKE IT' teaser by BABYMONSTER claiming the #1 trending music video spot on YouTube worldwide. Real milestone, but it's a bare RT with a cut-off link.

cards.title: Krystari Thanks Purina
cards.caption: A Tagalog stan-vote RT thanking a sponsor with a campaign hashtag. Fully inside-baseball, no standalone payoff.

cards.title: Joss Way-Ar: Start Trending 9:15
cards.caption: Another GMMTV live-house trend-timing schedule post, near-identical to the Gawin one. Coordination logistics only.

cards.title: 'SAMI Is Trending. Something About Sweaty Men.'
cards.caption: The single funniest way to react to a trend you don't understand: shrug and say 'sounds about right :3'. Chaotic Bluesky energy, 1.9k likes deep. Do you even check WHY things trend anymore?
cards.quote: Apparently SAMI is trending, something to do with grabbing sweaty men? Sounds about right :3
cards.povText: POV: it's trending and you've decided not to look into it
